items.name_cn:
Dior Nolita Bag
A fashionably elegant silhouette reinterpreting Dior's modern elegance.
Featuring a structured top handle with vintage gold-finish metal hardware, accented with a sliding D.I.O.R. charm for a lively touch.
The video shows the medium size with a drawstring closure. The practical interior features a card slot, paired with an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 28 x 25 x 5cm

items.name_cn:
💰, High Version
[New Mermaid Lace ❤ Medium]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It accommodates various daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more fashionable look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model Number: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

items.name_en: Dior Book Tote New Leather Tote❗
items.name_cn:
Dior Book Tote New Leather Tote❗
New Blue Tiger New Leather Medium In Stock🔥
Dior classic color scheme, super 3D pattern with a premium feel.
The Animal Collection combines beauty and practicality, very beautiful😘
Side uses original cowhide reinforcement, making the bag structured and textured! Can be carried by hand or crossbody, satisfying multiple carrying methods.
Highly recommended that the medium size completely meets daily travel needs🙋🏻‍♀️
Imported high-density embroidery Embroidery is clear and full🪡
8005
Small size: 26*21*12cm
Medium size: 36*27*16cm

items.name_cn:
30 Montaigne Mini Drawstring Bucket Bag
Blue Oblique print fabric
Code: S2374UTZQ
This mini drawstring bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a casual and elegant design. Crafted with blue Oblique print fabric and other materials, it features a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo on the front and a drawstring compartment to hold various daily essentials. It comes with an adjustable chain shoulder strap with leather accents, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody for a comfortable experience.
Main: Cotton, calfskin, technical fabric
Lining: Sheepskin, technical fabric
Front with CD logo
Drawstring closure
Internal compartment
3 card slots
Adjustable shoulder strap, chain part made of vintage gold-finish metal links with leather accents
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 16 x 18.5 x 13 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder and 1 mobile phone

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Waxed Leather Black Large]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth stitching. The spacious interior features a compartment and a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather drawstring closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The large size features a leather handle with adjustable details, suitable for hand or shoulder carry.
CD Lock and drawstring closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2823
Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm
Handle length: 14 - 29 cm. 000820
